title: Don hang da duoc tao
body: Cam on ban da dat hang. Don hang cua ban dang cho xac nhan.

title: Don hang dang duoc xu ly
body: Shop da tiep nhan don va dang chuan bi hang cho ban.

title: Khuyen mai cuoi tuan
body: Nhap ma WELCOME10 de giam gia cho don hang moi trong tuan nay.

title: Don hang da giao thanh cong
body: Don hang cua ban da duoc giao thanh cong. Danh gia san pham ngay nhe.

title: Uu dai cho thanh vien moi
body: Ban nhan duoc coupon NEWUSER25 cho don hang dau tien tren app.

title: Don hang dang van chuyen
body: Don hang cua ban da roi kho va dang tren duong giao den ban.

title: Flash sale phu kien
body: AirPods, chuot va ban phim dang duoc giam gia trong 24 gio.

title: Don hang da duoc tao
body: He thong da ghi nhan don hang moi cua ban. Vui long theo doi trang thai.

title: Ma giam gia thang nay
body: Su dung ma TECH15 de tiet kiem khi mua laptop va phu kien.

title: Don hang da huy
body: Don hang cua ban da duoc huy theo yeu cau. Tien se duoc hoan neu da thanh toan.
